since_last: 37% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.30%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.66% · BTC -0.67% · Gold +0.97% · Nasdaq100 -1.03%. 37% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.30%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.30%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.67%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +6.87%, MU +3.49%, LEU +3.12%, ORCL +2.52%, PANW +2.18%. Laggards: ISRG -12.67%, PUBM -5.58%, SNAP -5.11%, SPCX -5.03%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.03% at $124.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
